metaDescription: MauriTech delivers residential internet, professional Wi-Fi, fiber optic installation, and enterprise network infrastructure across Mauritania.
footerTagline: Internet, Wi-Fi, and network infrastructure solutions for homes, businesses, and institutions.
heroHeadline: Bringing Reliable Internet to Every Corner
heroSubheadline: Complete Internet, Wi-Fi, and Network Infrastructure Solutions for Homes, Businesses, and Institutions in Mauritania.
heroTagline: Residential Internet • Home Wi-Fi • Fiber Optic • Enterprise Networks
servicesSubtitle: Specialized internet distribution, Wi-Fi deployment, and network infrastructure for every environment.
serviceResidentialDesc: Reliable home internet with optimized routing, speed tiers, and professional installation.
serviceHomeWifiDesc: Whole-home Wi-Fi design, mesh systems, and coverage planning for every room.
serviceBusinessDesc: Secure office LAN/WAN, guest networks, VLAN segmentation, and business-grade connectivity.
serviceInfrastructureDesc: Structured cabling, switching, routing, and backbone design for campuses and institutions.
serviceFiberDesc: Fiber runs, splicing, termination, and high-capacity links for homes and enterprises.
serviceMaintenanceDesc: Preventive maintenance, remote diagnostics, on-site intervention, and SLA-backed support.
coverageCtaDescription: Enter your home details and get a recommended floor layout, equipment list, and installation estimate in seconds.
step1Description: We assess your space, wall types, and connectivity goals to design the right solution.
step2Description: Custom floor plans, equipment selection, and coverage mapping tailored to your needs.
step3Description: Certified technicians deploy cabling, access points, and fiber with clean workmanship.
step4Description: Maintenance, monitoring, and technical support to keep your network performing.
project.title: Project

ctaTitle: Request a professional installation or consultation.
ctaDescription: Share your needs and our team will respond with a clear scope, timeline, and recommendations.

authRegisterDescription: Register to access customer tools, chat, and invoices.
authNameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
authPasswordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters
authForgotDescription: Enter your email and we will send you a secure link if an account exists.
authForgotDone: If an account exists for this email, you will receive instructions shortly.
authResetSuccess: Your password has been updated. You can sign in now.
authResetInvalid: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
contactFormSuccess: Thank you. Your message was received and our team will respond soon.
contactFormError: Could not send your message. Please try again.
portalChangePasswordActive: Leave password fields empty to keep your current password.
portalDescription: Access invoices, contact administration, and review account activity.
portalWelcome: This is your workspace for invoices and support messages.
portalServiceRequestsHint: Installation quotes, site surveys, and consultation requests tied to your account.
portalAccountStatusHint: Your access is active and ready for use.
portalInvoiceHint: Filter invoices by status and download PDFs.
portalChangePasswordHint: Update your email, password, and contact details securely.
portalSettingsHint: Manage your profile and security settings.
adminEquipmentHint: Manage routers, access points, and mesh nodes used by the coverage calculator.
adminNoCustomers: No customers found (configure Supabase or add data).
adminSeedTip: Tip: seed projects via Supabase SQL or Table Editor.
adminCatalogActiveRules: Catalog items and active pricing rules.
adminStaffInvoiceHint: Staff can create invoices via POST /api/admin/invoices (JSON body). Customer portal:
analyticsTrafficSummary: Traffic, AI usage, and chat volume (last 7 days).
analyticsNoPageViewData: No page view data in this window.
portalDownloadPdf: Download PDF copies for your records.
portalMessagesDescription: Send messages and keep a record of your requests.
portalAccountDescription: Review your account details and activity history.
coverageDescription: Estimate your Wi-Fi layout, equipment needs, and installation cost instantly. Validate on-site before final BOQ.
coverageRequestSent: Consultation request sent. Our team will contact you shortly.
coveragePreviewDescription: See router and AP placement, structured cabling paths, and predicted signal strength before we visit site.
aiSubtitle: Answers are informational. Request a site survey for final quotes.
aiSignInHint: Tip: sign in to tie usage to your account. Guests can still ask technical questions.
aiQuestionPlaceholder: Example: How do I estimate fiber loss budget for a 2km link?
